series_metadata.series_title: Motor Vehicle Dealer License, Miscellaneous Business Plates, and Salvage License
series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes all paper and scanned applications and/or documents that are submitted for a motor vehicle dealers license, miscellaneous business plates, and salvage licenses that have been issued by the BMV dealer licensing section.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: three months from scan date. ; Electronic: records seven years from date of dealer expiration or cancellation, unless record is marked as a board or protest case
